name: RAHUL SHARMA
text: THE ROADMAPS GAVE ME ABSOLUTE CLARITY. THE SPRINT SCHEDULE KEPT ME DISCIPLINED THROUGHOUT MY FINAL YEAR.

name: ANANYA IYER
text: UNLIKE FLUFFY CHANNELS, THE PURE DISCIPLINE APPROACH GAVE ME THE CORE RECALL NEEDED FOR RECURSIVE CONCEPTS.

name: SIDDHARTH V.
text: THE PYQ WORKFLOW BREAKS DOWN COMPLEX PAGING SCHEMES TO TRIVIAL MATHEMATICAL RELATIONS.
